meta.home.title: Intellica | Unleashing Value From Data
meta.home.description: Intellica empowers enterprises to generate sustainable value from data through modern data platforms, analytics solutions, and production-grade AI systems.
home.hero.label: Data & AI · Trusted Since 2006
home.hero.desc: We design and deliver enterprise data platforms that enable reliable analytics and production-ready AI.
home.proof.text: We help organizations move from fragmented data to measurable business outcomes — enabling faster decisions, better operations and scalable AI.
home.capabilities.label: Capabilities
home.capabilities.title: Enterprise Data &
home.capabilities.sub: From data platforms to enterprise AI applications — we design, build and operate scalable data ecosystems.
home.capabilities.card1.title: Modern Data Platforms & DWH
home.capabilities.card1.desc: We build scalable data platforms; managing architecture, cloud modernization and integration end-to-end.
home.capabilities.card2.title: BI & Advanced Analytics
home.capabilities.card2.desc: Transforming data into actionable insights with dashboards and self-service analytics for real-time decisions.
home.capabilities.card3.title: AI & Machine Learning
home.capabilities.card3.desc: Enhancing processes with GenAI/LLM and intelligent agents — demand forecasting and NLP analytics.
home.capabilities.card4.title: Data Governance & Products
home.capabilities.card4.desc: Ensuring data quality and consistency with ICC, ReTouch and industry-specific data models for standardized data.
home.capabilities.card5.title: Consulting & Expert Support
home.capabilities.card5.desc: Governance, GAP analysis and target roadmaps — plus expert team deployment and managed services.
home.globalImpact.label: Global Presence
home.globalImpact.title: Global Impact in Data &
home.globalImpact.sub: Turkey-based data and AI company delivering enterprise-grade solutions across 20+ countries with successful projects in banking, telecom, public sector and manufacturing.
home.globalImpact.metric1.label: Countries
home.globalImpact.metric1.desc: where Intellica has successfully delivered data and AI projects.
home.globalImpact.metric2.label: Projects
home.globalImpact.metric2.desc: delivered for global organizations across multiple industries.
home.globalImpact.metric3.label: Professionals
home.globalImpact.metric3.desc: including solution architects, data engineers and AI specialists.
home.globalImpact.metric4.label: Platforms
home.globalImpact.metric4.desc: covering modern DWH, lakehouse and cloud architectures.
home.trustedClients.label: Trusted By
home.trustedClients.title: Trusted by
home.trustedClients.sub: From banking to telecoms, insurance to government — selected enterprises we run data and AI projects with.
home.dwh.label: Enterprise Data Platforms
home.dwh.title: Enterprise
home.dwh.sub: Build modern data platforms that power analytics, AI and enterprise applications.
home.dwh.card1.title: DWH Modernization
home.dwh.card1.desc: Simplify your data warehouse, strengthen the layered architecture. Build scalable structures with cloud migration and cost/performance optimization.
home.dwh.card2.title: Data Integration & Operations
home.dwh.card2.desc: Build reliable data flows from source systems; ensure sustainable operations with data quality gates.
home.dwh.card3.title: Semantic Layer & BI Architecture
home.dwh.card3.desc: Standardize KPIs in a single truth layer, balance self-service with enterprise control.

home.products.title: Enterprise

home.aiSolutions.label: AI PORTFOLIO
home.aiSolutions.title: Enterprise AI Solutions
home.aiSolutions.sub: Production-grade AI solutions designed to improve decisions, automate operations and unlock business value.
home.aiSolutions.card1.title: Customer Intelligence AI
home.aiSolutions.card1.desc: Natural language access to enterprise data through intelligent AI assistants.
home.aiSolutions.card2.title: Predictive Decisioning AI
home.aiSolutions.card2.desc: Forecasting, scoring and optimization models that improve decision-making.
home.aiSolutions.card3.title: Knowledge Automation
home.aiSolutions.card3.desc: AI-powered search, summarization and document intelligence for enterprise knowledge.
home.aiSolutions.card4.title: Operational & Agentic AI
home.aiSolutions.card4.desc: Autonomous AI systems that execute workflows and optimize operations in real time.
home.successStories.label: Real-World Impact
home.successStories.title: Selected
home.successStories.sub: From data consistency to AI-driven decision support, we help organizations solve real business problems with scalable data and AI solutions.
home.successStories.card1.desc: Improved data consistency across critical systems — reducing reconciliation effort and increasing reporting accuracy.
home.successStories.card2.desc: Enabled scalable data models and analytics — improving customer insights and operational efficiency.
home.successStories.card3.desc: Strengthened forecasting and visibility — enabling more accurate planning and better operational decisions.
home.whyIntellica.label: Why Intellica
home.whyIntellica.title: Why Organizations
home.whyIntellica.sub: We are not just a technology provider — we combine consulting, engineering, and products to deliver end-to-end data and AI transformation.
home.whyIntellica.card1.title: End-to-End Delivery
home.whyIntellica.card1.desc: From strategy to production — including data platforms, AI deployment and long-term operations.
home.whyIntellica.card2.title: Vendor-Agnostic Approach
home.whyIntellica.card2.desc: Proven across multiple enterprise technology stacks and cloud ecosystems.
home.whyIntellica.card3.title: Proven Enterprise Experience
home.whyIntellica.card3.desc: Experience across complex, large-scale environments where data reliability is critical.
home.howWeWork.label: Methodology
home.howWeWork.title: How We
home.howWeWork.sub: A structured approach to design, build, and operate enterprise data platforms.
home.howWeWork.step1.title: Discovery & GAP Analysis
home.howWeWork.step1.desc: Identify current state, risks and quick wins; define target KPIs.
home.howWeWork.step2.title: Target Architecture & Roadmap
home.howWeWork.step2.desc: Design platform, DWH, semantic layer and governance with phased transition plan.
home.howWeWork.step3.title: Implementation & Integration
home.howWeWork.step3.desc: Build pipelines, apply quality gates and observability with production standards.
home.howWeWork.step4.title: Go-Live & MLOps
home.howWeWork.step4.desc: Deploy AI solutions to production confidently — with versioning, monitoring and improvement cycles.
home.howWeWork.step5.title: Operations & Expert Support
home.howWeWork.step5.desc: Sustain SLA, maintenance, optimization and continuous improvement with our managed service model.
home.testimonials.label: Testimonials
home.testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
home.testimonials.sub: Feedback from enterprise-scale projects across different industries.
home.testimonials.t1.quote: Thanks to the technical assessment and roadmap work, we quickly identified the right modernization steps.
home.testimonials.t1.name: VP Data Platforms – Finance
home.testimonials.t2.quote: The architectural decisions and operational approach during migration enabled a seamless transition.
home.testimonials.t2.name: Analytics Lead – Telecom
home.testimonials.t3.quote: With the outsource team and managed service model, operational burden was significantly reduced.
home.testimonials.t3.name: IT Director – Retail

meta.about.title: About | Intellica
meta.about.description: Learn about Intellica — a Data & AI company founded in 2006, active in 20+ countries with 450+ Data & AI professionals.
about.schema.name: About Intellica
about.schema.description: Learn about Intellica — a Data & AI company founded in 2006, active in 20+ countries with 450+ Data & AI professionals.
about.hero.label: Data & AI · Trusted Since 2006
about.hero.title: About
about.hero.desc: A Data & AI company founded in 2006 — helping enterprises turn complex data into a strategic advantage, at scale.
about.whoWeAre.label: Global Presence
about.whoWeAre.title: Empowering Enterprises Through
about.whoWeAre.desc1: Intellica is a global Data & AI company with nearly two decades of experience. Since 2006, we've helped enterprises transform raw data into a powerful strategic asset — and we've been at the forefront of how that work has evolved.
about.whoWeAre.desc2: Our team of 100+ specialists — solution architects, data engineers, and AI practitioners — delivers end-to-end solutions across 20+ countries, from data platform engineering to production-grade agentic AI systems.
about.whoWeAre.stat1.label: Countries where Intellica has delivered Data & AI projects.
about.whoWeAre.stat2.label: Enterprise Data & AI projects delivered across industries worldwide.
about.whoWeAre.stat3.label: Data & AI professionals — architects, engineers, and AI specialists.
about.whoWeAre.stat4.label: Enterprise data platforms built — modern DWH, lakehouse, and cloud architectures.
about.capabilities.label: Expertise
about.capabilities.title: Core
about.capabilities.desc: We bridge the gap between complex data infrastructure and real business outcomes. Our work is results-driven: absolute data consistency, and AI that actually works in production.
about.capabilities.card1.title: Data Platform
about.capabilities.card1.desc: Lakehouse modernisation, DWH design, and high-performance data integration.
about.capabilities.card2.title: AI & agents
about.capabilities.card2.desc: Production-grade LLMs, RAG applications, and multi-agent autonomous systems.
about.capabilities.card3.title: Governance
about.capabilities.card3.desc: Data consistency monitoring, quality gates, and automated reconciliation.
about.capabilities.card4.title: Scale
about.capabilities.card4.desc: Supporting massive telemetry and high-concurrency analytical workloads.
about.howWeWork.title: How We
about.howWeWork.step1.title: Understand
about.howWeWork.step1.desc: We start by understanding your business, data landscape, and key challenges.
about.howWeWork.step2.title: Design
about.howWeWork.step2.desc: We design scalable data architectures and AI solutions aligned with your goals.
about.howWeWork.step3.title: Deliver
about.howWeWork.step3.desc: We implement, optimize, and continuously improve solutions in production.
about.values.label: Our Values
about.values.title: What
about.values.sub: The principles that guide how we work — and shape who we are.
about.values.card1.title: Measurable Impact
about.values.card1.desc: We measure success by real business outcomes — not deliverables or effort.
about.values.card2.title: Technical Excellence
about.values.card2.desc: Deep technical knowledge combined with industry experience — built to solve real problems in production.
about.values.card3.title: Long-term Partnership
about.values.card3.desc: We build lasting relationships. Our commitment to clients extends well beyond go-live.
about.values.card4.title: Innovation Culture
about.values.card4.desc: Continuous investment in R&D, proprietary products, and emerging technologies keeps us ahead of the curve.
about.history.label: Our Journey
about.history.title: Company
about.history.sub: Nearly two decades of milestones — from a two-person founding to a global Data & AI firm.
about.history.2006.title: Intellica Foundation
about.history.2006.desc: Dr. Kemal Unaltuna and Can Alhas
about.history.2009.title: EVAM
about.history.2011.title: Zagrebacka Bank
about.history.2011.desc: First major international project — Zagrebacka Bank, Croatia
about.history.2012.title: Organizational
about.history.2014.title: Zain Group
about.history.2014.desc: International expansion into telecoms — Zain Group projects
about.history.2015a.title: EVAM A.Ş.
about.history.2015b.title: ITDM
about.history.2016.title: Merger with PiA
about.history.2016.desc: Merger with PiA, R&D centre established — 80 employees
about.history.2019.title: IFDM — ICC
about.history.2020.title: Retouch
about.history.2021.title: UK Foundation
about.history.2022.title: Blue Octopus
about.history.2022.desc: Security data projects with Ministry of Interior
about.history.2023.title: 100+ Employee
about.history.2025.title: AI

about.clients.title: Trusted by
about.clients.desc: We work with 100+ enterprise organisations across banking, telecoms, and manufacturing — delivering measurable Data & AI outcomes.

meta.products.title: Products | Intellica
meta.products.description: Explore Intellica's Enterprise Product Portfolio — industry data models, data governance platforms, and AI-powered tools.
productsPage.schema.name: Intellica Enterprise Product Portfolio
productsPage.schema.description: Enterprise Product Portfolio — industry data models, data governance platforms, and AI-powered tools.
productsPage.hero.label: ENTERPRISE PRODUCT PORTFOLIO
productsPage.hero.title: Our
productsPage.hero.desc: End-to-end product architecture spanning industry data models, governance platforms, and AI-powered tools.
productsPage.dataModels.label: 01 · Data Models
productsPage.dataModels.title: Industry
productsPage.dataModels.sub: Licensed, pre-built data warehouse models designed for specific industry verticals — accelerating your data platform delivery.
productsPage.ifdm.desc: International standard data warehouse model for the finance industry. Pre-modeled with regulatory reporting, risk, CRM and more — ready to deploy.
productsPage.itdm.desc: Industry-specific data warehouse model for telecom operators. Network, billing, CRM dimensioning — pre-built and tested globally.
productsPage.hrdm.desc: Optimized data warehouse model for HR processes — workforce analytics, payroll, talent management ready from day one.
productsPage.governance.label: 02 · Data Platform & Governance
productsPage.governance.title: Platform &
productsPage.governance.sub: Enterprise-grade tools for data consistency, quality, entry management and no-code application development.
productsPage.icc.desc: Central data consistency management platform. Define reconciliation rules, monitor quality gates, and get automated alerts on data drift.
productsPage.retouch.desc: Validate, cleanse and import external data into your core systems with approval workflows, audit trails and version control.
productsPage.retable.desc: Build flexible apps and data tables without code. Collaborative, cloud-based platform with automations, integrations and AI capabilities.
productsPage.orqenta.desc: High-reliability platform for workflow orchestration and distributed job scheduling. Orchestrate complex data pipelines with precision, automation and full control.
productsPage.ai.label: 03 · AI Products
productsPage.ai.title: Enterprise
productsPage.ai.sub: Enterprise AI applications for analytics, automation and decision intelligence.
productsPage.talkto.desc: Ask your enterprise data questions in natural language. Get instant SQL queries, visualizations and insights — completely governed and auditable.
productsPage.blueoctopus.desc: Detect, analyze and manage critical business events in real time with AI-powered event intelligence and automated response across systems.
productsPage.var.desc: AI-powered voice signature creation, speaker matching and identity extraction. Built for security, call center and compliance use cases.
productsPage.cta.title: Ready to Transform Your
productsPage.cta.desc: From data platforms to AI solutions, we help organizations turn data into measurable business value.
productsDetail.ctaDesc: Schedule a personalized demo with our experts.
productsDetail.ifdm.desc: International standard data warehouse model for the finance industry. Pre-modeled with regulatory reporting, risk, CRM and more — ready to deploy.
productsDetail.itdm.desc: Industry-specific data warehouse model for telecom operators. Network, billing, CRM dimensioning — pre-built and tested globally.
productsDetail.hrdm.desc: Optimized data warehouse model for HR processes — workforce analytics, payroll, talent management ready from day one.
productsDetail.icc.desc: Central data consistency management platform. Define reconciliation rules, monitor quality gates, and get automated alerts on data drift.
productsDetail.retouch.desc: Validate, cleanse and import external data into your core systems with approval workflows, audit trails and version control.
productsDetail.retable.desc: Build flexible apps and data tables without code. Collaborative, cloud-based platform with automations, integrations and AI capabilities.
productsDetail.talkto.desc: Ask your enterprise data questions in natural language. Get instant SQL queries, visualizations and insights — completely governed and auditable.
productsDetail.blueoctopus.desc: Monitor critical data from a single center with AI-powered analytics. Event detection, alerting and action management across systems.
productsDetail.var.desc: AI-powered voice signature creation, speaker matching and identity extraction. Built for security, call center and compliance use cases.
meta.solutions.title: AI Solutions | Intellica
meta.solutions.description: Enterprise-grade AI blueprints, modern analytical frameworks, and data platform strategies.
solutions.hero.label: AI SOLUTIONS
solutions.hero.title: AI That Works in
solutions.hero.desc: Build scalable, enterprise-grade AI solutions on a trusted data foundation — from use case to real business impact.
solutions.aiOverview.label: AI Solutions
solutions.aiOverview.title: Enterprise
solutions.aiOverview.sub: Production-grade AI solutions designed to improve decisions, automate operations and unlock business value.
solutions.aiOverview.card1.title: Customer Intelligence AI
solutions.aiOverview.card1.desc: Natural language access to enterprise data through intelligent AI assistants.
solutions.aiOverview.card2.title: Predictive Decisioning AI
solutions.aiOverview.card2.desc: Forecasting, scoring and optimization models that improve decision-making.
solutions.aiOverview.card3.title: Knowledge Automation
solutions.aiOverview.card3.desc: AI-powered search, summarization and document intelligence for enterprise knowledge.
solutions.aiOverview.card4.title: Operational & Agentic AI
solutions.aiOverview.card4.desc: Autonomous AI systems that execute workflows and optimize operations in real time.
solutions.howItWorks.label: Our Approach
solutions.howItWorks.title: How Our AI
solutions.howItWorks.sub: From raw data to real-time decisions — our AI solutions follow a consistent and scalable approach.
solutions.howItWorks.step1.title: Data Collection
solutions.howItWorks.step1.desc: Collect data from enterprise systems, sensors, and operational sources.
solutions.howItWorks.step2.title: AI Analysis
solutions.howItWorks.step2.desc: Apply machine learning models to detect patterns, anomalies, and inefficiencies.
solutions.howItWorks.step3.title: Insights & Decisions
solutions.howItWorks.step3.desc: Generate actionable insights and recommendations for optimization.
solutions.howItWorks.step4.title: Action & Monitoring
solutions.howItWorks.step4.desc: Enable real-time actions, alerts, and continuous monitoring through dashboards.
solutions.architecture.title: How We Build Production-Ready
solutions.architecture.sub: A proven architecture that transforms raw data into intelligent, scalable AI systems.
solutions.architecture.dataFoundationDes: Trusted, governed and high-quality data sources
solutions.architecture.aiLayerDesc: Where models, logic and automation come together
solutions.architecture.businessAppsDesc: Delivering AI into real business processes
solutions.architecture.note: From data to decision — an integrated architecture that enables scalable, secure and production-grade AI.
solutions.portfolio.label: Solution Portfolio
solutions.portfolio.title: Production-Ready
solutions.portfolio.sub: Proven AI solutions designed to deliver measurable business outcomes across customer, decision, knowledge and operational use cases.
solutions.portfolio.group1.label: Customer Intelligence
solutions.portfolio.customer360.title: AI-Assisted Customer 360
solutions.portfolio.customer360.desc: Integrates CRM, complaints and behavioral data to enable smarter customer interactions and personalized service.
solutions.portfolio.group2.label: Predictive Decisioning
solutions.portfolio.demandPrediction.des: Forecasts demand patterns to optimize staffing, reduce wait times and improve operational efficiency.
solutions.portfolio.procurementAnalytics: Predicts material and commodity price movements to improve purchasing decisions and budget planning.
solutions.portfolio.likelihoodToBuy.desc: Identifies high-potential customers to improve targeting, conversion and campaign performance.
solutions.portfolio.group3.label: Knowledge Automation
solutions.portfolio.documentAnswers.desc: Searches and summarizes enterprise documents to provide fast and accurate answers.
solutions.portfolio.group4.label: Operational AI
solutions.portfolio.defectSolver.title: AI Defect Solver
solutions.portfolio.defectSolver.desc: Predicts failures in advance to reduce downtime and improve production efficiency.
solutions.portfolio.rollingForce.title: Rolling Force Optimization
solutions.portfolio.rollingForce.desc: Optimizes production parameters to reduce passes, energy use and improve output quality.
solutions.portfolio.energyOptimization.d: Monitors and optimizes energy usage in real time to reduce cost and emissions.

solutions.cta.desc: From data platforms to AI solutions, we help organizations turn data into measurable business value.

meta.careers.title: Careers | Intellica
meta.careers.description: Join the Intellica team and build the future of Data & AI. Explore opportunities in Data Engineering, BI, AI, and more.
careers.hero.label: JOIN OUR TEAM
careers.hero.title: Innovate with
careers.hero.desc1: We build enterprise data platforms and AI solutions that create measurable impact.
careers.hero.desc2: Join Intellica and work on real-world projects in data engineering, BI, data quality, DWH and AI for global organizations across multiple industries.
careers.why.title: Why Join Intellica?
careers.impact.card1.title: Impact-Oriented Projects
careers.impact.card1.desc:
Real business problems. Real impact.
Projects that create measurable value.
careers.impact.card2.title: Expertise Development
careers.impact.card2.desc: Mentorship, a strong learning culture, and continuous knowledge sharing.
careers.impact.card3.title: Product + Consulting
careers.impact.card3.desc: Real-world consulting experience combined with strong product engineering.
careers.roles.label: Opportunities
careers.roles.title: Where Can You
careers.roles.sub: We are looking for talents in various domains of Data & AI. Opportunities are updated based on project needs.
careers.role1.title: Data Engineering
careers.role1.desc: ETL/ELT, data integration, pipeline design, data quality & observability.
careers.role2.title: BI & Analytics
careers.role2.desc: Semantic models, reporting, dashboard design, performance, and UX.
careers.role3.title: Business / Data Analysis
careers.role3.desc: Requirement analysis, business rule design, data dictionary, end-to-end process flow.
careers.role4.title: Data Modeling
careers.role4.desc: LDM/PDM, S2T mapping, dimensional modeling, layered architecture principles.
careers.role5.title: Data Quality
careers.role5.desc: Rule sets, monitoring, alerts & reporting, root cause analysis, and continuous improvement.
careers.role6.title: AI / LLM Applications
careers.role6.desc: Enterprise AI assistants, RAG, agentic workflows, security, and governance.
careers.values.title: Our
careers.values.sub: The principles that guide our work and collaboration every day.
careers.value1.title: Trust
careers.value1.desc: We build long-term relationships through transparency, responsibility, and trust.
careers.value2.title: Quality
careers.value2.desc: We focus on measurable, reliable, and repeatable delivery standards.
careers.value3.title: Innovation
careers.value3.desc: We transform AI and modern data technologies into real business value.
careers.apply.title: Join the
careers.apply.desc: At Intellica, we work with talents who are open to learning, take responsibility, value teamwork, and "own the work." Share your CV and a short introduction about yourself.
careers.apply.quickDesc:
You can share your CV and a short note with us at hr@intellica.net.
We will reach out when a suitable position becomes available.
careers.apply.noteDesc: Including the areas you want to work in, your experience level, and portfolio links (GitHub, LinkedIn) helps speed up the evaluation.
careers.cta.title: Ready to Join
careers.cta.desc: Explore opportunities and become part of a team building modern data platforms and AI solutions.
meta.clients.title: Clients | Intellica
meta.clients.description: Trusted by leading enterprises across banking, telecom, public sector, and manufacturing.
clients.hero.label: OUR CLIENTS
clients.hero.title: Our
clients.hero.desc: Trusted by leading organizations across industries.
clients.hero.desc2: We have worked with leading organizations across banking, telecom, insurance, retail, and public sector — delivering data and AI solutions at scale.
clients.industry.title: Industry
clients.industry.sub: Explore a selection of client engagements by industry.
clients.impact.label: Client Impact
clients.impact.title: Selected
clients.impact.sub: Representative examples based on our real project experience across industries.
clients.impact.card1.title: Optimize Operations
clients.impact.card1.short: AI-powered energy optimization for manufacturing efficiency.
clients.impact.card1.detail: Real-time anomaly detection and parameter optimization using sensor data reduced energy consumption and improved operational efficiency.
clients.impact.card2.title: Grow Revenue
clients.impact.card2.short: Predictive customer analytics and next best offer solutions.
clients.impact.card2.detail: Machine learning models for churn prediction and personalized recommendations enabled proactive customer engagement and revenue growth.
clients.impact.card3.title: Unlock Knowledge
clients.impact.card3.short: AI-powered document intelligence and enterprise search.
clients.impact.card3.detail: RAG-based solutions enabled users to query enterprise documents in natural language and access insights instantly.
clients.impact.card4.title: Build Data Foundation
clients.impact.card4.short: Enterprise data platform and modern data warehouse implementation.
clients.impact.card4.detail: Designed and implemented scalable data platforms enabling integrated data access, high data quality, and self-service analytics.
clients.global.title: Global
clients.global.desc: Intellica delivers projects across Europe, the Middle East and Asia—supporting distributed teams and enterprise-scale architectures.

meta.academy.title: Data & AI Talent Program | Intellica
meta.academy.description: A hands-on program for senior students and new graduates who want to build real-world skills in data engineering, analytics, and AI.
academy.hero.label: DATA & AI TALENT PROGRAM
academy.hero.title: Start Your Career in
academy.hero.desc: A hands-on program designed for senior students and new graduates who want to build real-world skills in data engineering, analytics, and AI. Learn from experienced professionals, work on practical use cases, and take your first step into the industry with confidence.
academy.hero.stat1.label: Years of Experience
academy.hero.stat2.label: Graduates
academy.hero.stat3.label: Week Camp Program
academy.about.title: About the
academy.about.desc: Intellica's Data & AI Talent Program is designed to bridge the gap between academic learning and real business life. Through hands-on training, practical workshops, and real project examples, participants gain the technical and professional foundation needed to start a career in data and AI.
academy.about.card1.title: Learn from Real Experts
academy.about.card1.desc: Participants work closely with experienced Intellica professionals and gain first-hand insight into how real data projects are designed, delivered, and improved in business environments.
academy.about.card2.title: Hands-On Learning Experience
academy.about.card2.desc: The program combines core concepts with practical workshops, helping participants turn theory into applicable skills in data modeling, ETL, reporting, and analytics.
academy.invite.title: Join Our
academy.invite.desc: If you want to build a strong foundation in data technologies and gain practical experience with real-world scenarios, this program is designed for you.
academy.curriculum.label: CURRICULUM
academy.curriculum.title: Program
academy.curriculum.desc: The program is structured in three modules, covering the fundamentals of modern data work from modeling to reporting.
academy.module1.title: Module 1 — Foundations & Data Modeling
academy.module1.i1: Understanding the fundamentals of the data ecosystem
academy.module1.i2: Learning core data modeling concepts and integration logic
academy.module1.i3: Building structured models inspired by real business scenarios
academy.module2.title: Module 2 — Data Processing & ETL
academy.module2.i1: Understanding how data is extracted, transformed, and loaded
academy.module2.i2: Learning how data pipelines are designed with practical examples
academy.module2.i3: Developing hands-on skills through workshops and exercises
academy.module2.h1: Build core and advanced data technology knowledge
academy.module2.h2: Gain practical skills that support career readiness
academy.module2.h3: Understand how real data teams solve business problems
academy.module3.title: Module 3 — Reporting & Data Visualization
academy.module3.i1: Turning data into meaningful business insights
academy.module3.i2: Learning effective reporting and presentation techniques
academy.who.title: Who should apply?
academy.who.desc: Senior undergraduate students, master's or doctoral students, and new graduates with up to one year of experience are prioritised.
academy.why.title: Why join the program?
academy.why.desc: Gain hands-on experience, learn from professionals, strengthen your technical foundation, and increase your opportunity to move into internship or full-time roles.
academy.uni.title: University
academy.uni.desc: For more than a decade, Intellica has collaborated with leading universities to help young talent transition from education into professional life through practical learning and industry exposure.
academy.testimonials.title: Participant
academy.testimonials.sub: Experiences shared by our graduates and instructors.
academy.testimonial1.quote: I've been working at Intellica for eight years. Participating as an instructor in the camp program where I once joined as a student is very special to me. I believe Intellica Academy offers a perfect opportunity for those starting their careers.
academy.testimonial1.author: Emre Usta
academy.testimonial2.quote: Our annual camp program for new graduates opens doors to the business world. Focused on data warehousing, business intelligence, and software development, we provide a wide range of knowledge from concepts to practical training.
academy.testimonial2.author: Turgay Burgaz
academy.testimonial3.quote: The 2023 camp was a turning point for my experience. The sincere atmosphere and the instructors' helpfulness were most impressive. I believe the BI training I received formed a solid foundation for the first steps of my career.
academy.testimonial3.author: Berkay Boz
academy.faq.title: Frequently Asked
academy.faq.sub: Everything you may want to know about the program.
academy.faq1.a: Senior undergraduate students, master's or doctoral students, and new graduates with up to 1 year of experience are prioritised.
academy.faq2.a: The program lasts approximately 3 weeks, depending on the session.
academy.faq3.a: The program is provided free of charge for new graduates.
academy.faq4.a: In addition to the application form, your CV and graduation certificate, if available, should be submitted.
academy.faq5.q: Are there job opportunities after the program?
academy.faq5.a: Successful participants may be considered for internship, part-time, or full-time opportunities, depending on business needs and evaluation results.
academy.faq6.a: Training sessions are held at the Intellica Atasehir office.
academy.faq7.a: The program covers real business cases, practical applications, core data concepts, and industry-oriented problem solving.
academy.faq8.a: We evaluate every application carefully, but because quotas are limited, not every applicant can be accepted.
academy.faq9.a: Yes. Participants who successfully complete the program receive a certificate.
academy.faq10.a: Participants are responsible for arranging their own accommodation during the program period.
academy.cta.title: Apply or Get Detailed Information
academy.cta.desc: Contact us to learn more about the program, application process, and upcoming sessions.
meta.dataPlatforms.title: Modern Data Platforms | Intellica
meta.dataPlatforms.description: Design and build scalable data platforms that collect, organize and govern enterprise data. A modern data foundation for analytics, reporting and AI.
dataPlatforms.hero.label: DATA PLATFORM
dataPlatforms.hero.title: Enterprise Data Platforms
dataPlatforms.hero.desc: Scalable architectures that collect, integrate and govern enterprise data — enabling analytics and AI at scale.
dataPlatforms.overview.card1.label: Strategic Assessment
dataPlatforms.overview.card1.title: Discovery & Architecture Design
dataPlatforms.overview.card1.desc: We assess your current data landscape and define a scalable architecture and transformation path as the foundation of your data platform.
dataPlatforms.overview.card2.label: Modernization
dataPlatforms.overview.card2.title: Implementation
dataPlatforms.overview.card2.desc: Modern DWH/Lakehouse architecture, performance optimization, and cost-efficient cloud migration.
dataPlatforms.overview.card3.label: Data Operations
dataPlatforms.overview.card3.title: Integration
dataPlatforms.overview.card3.desc: End-to-end data engineering, orchestration pipelines, and scalable KPI / semantic layer design.
dataPlatforms.overview.card4.label: Sustained Quality
dataPlatforms.overview.card4.title: Governance
dataPlatforms.overview.card4.desc: Ensuring data quality, consistency, and security across the entire enterprise data platform.
dataPlatforms.why.label: Strategic Value
dataPlatforms.why.title: Why Modern Data Platforms
dataPlatforms.why.desc: Analytics and AI initiatives create sustainable value only when built on a reliable, scalable and operable data foundation.
dataPlatforms.why.card1.title: Reliable Data
dataPlatforms.why.card1.desc: Single source of truth, data quality controls and end-to-end traceability for trusted decisions.
dataPlatforms.why.card2.title: Scalable Analytics
dataPlatforms.why.card2.desc: Architectures that grow with your data volumes and analytical workloads without performance loss.
dataPlatforms.why.card3.title: Operational Sustainability
dataPlatforms.why.card3.desc: Security, access governance and cost management for long-term stability and ROI.
dataPlatforms.why.kpi1.title: Standardization
dataPlatforms.why.kpi1.desc: Metric/KPI dictionary, data model and integration standards
dataPlatforms.why.kpi2.title: Traceability
dataPlatforms.why.kpi3.title: AI Readiness
dataPlatforms.why.kpi3.desc: Trusted, scalable data layer for analytics & AI
dataPlatforms.arch.title: Modern Data Platform
dataPlatforms.arch.desc: We design enterprise data platforms with a layered architecture—covering ingestion, integration, storage and consumption.
dataPlatforms.arch.note: A reliable, scalable, and AI-ready data foundation tailored for enterprise scale.
dataPlatforms.cap.label: Capabilities
dataPlatforms.cap.title: Platform
dataPlatforms.cap.desc: We approach the platform holistically across architecture, governance and operations.
dataPlatforms.cap.card1.title: Data Integration
dataPlatforms.cap.card1.desc: Integrate data from operational systems, apps and external sources with reliable pipelines.
dataPlatforms.cap.card2.title: Data Warehousing
dataPlatforms.cap.card2.desc: High-performance analytical storage for reporting and advanced analytics.
dataPlatforms.cap.card3.title: Lakehouse Architecture
dataPlatforms.cap.card3.desc: Scale storage and processing for both structured and unstructured data.
dataPlatforms.cap.card4.title: Data Governance
dataPlatforms.cap.card4.desc: Quality, lineage, access management and compliance—built into the platform.
dataPlatforms.cap.card5.title: Data Quality
dataPlatforms.cap.card5.desc: Consistency monitoring, quality gates and automated reconciliation.
dataPlatforms.cap.card6.title: Semantic Layer
dataPlatforms.cap.card6.desc: Business-friendly models and KPIs that enable consistent self-service analytics.
dataPlatforms.vendor.title: Vendor-Agnostic by
dataPlatforms.vendor.desc: We are not tied to a single technology vendor. We evaluate alternatives and design the best-fit architecture based on your specific needs.
dataPlatforms.vendor.badge: Future-proof platforms without lock-in — optimized for your business goals.
dataPlatforms.tech.title: Technology
dataPlatforms.tech.desc: Representative technologies we work with — final architecture is selected based on client needs.
dataPlatforms.solutions.title: Intellica Solutions
dataPlatforms.solutions.desc: Our products and AI solutions deliver value on top of a strong data foundation.
dataPlatforms.solutions.icc.title: ICC
dataPlatforms.solutions.icc.desc: Enterprise data consistency and reconciliation controls for high-stakes environments.
dataPlatforms.solutions.retouch.title: Retouch
dataPlatforms.solutions.retouch.desc: Controlled data entry and master data validation workflows for operational excellence.
dataPlatforms.solutions.talkto.title: Talk To
dataPlatforms.solutions.talkto.desc: Conversational analytics powered by natural language interaction with your data.
dataPlatforms.solutions.docAnswers.title: Document Answers
dataPlatforms.solutions.docAnswers.desc: AI-powered knowledge assistant for enterprise documents and verified information.
dataPlatforms.services.label: Services
dataPlatforms.services.title: Data Platform
dataPlatforms.services.desc: Structured services designed to deliver, modernize, and operate enterprise data platforms at scale.
dataPlatforms.services.card1.title: Data Platform Assessment & Roadmap
dataPlatforms.services.card1.li1: Assessment of your current data architecture and maturity
dataPlatforms.services.card1.li2: Identification of gaps, risks and improvement areas
dataPlatforms.services.card1.li4: Phased roadmap with priorities, quick wins and business impact
dataPlatforms.services.card2.title: Implementation / Modernization
dataPlatforms.services.card2.li3: Modeling, semantic layer and KPI dictionary
dataPlatforms.services.card3.title: Migration
dataPlatforms.services.card3.li3: Standardization of models and naming conventions
dataPlatforms.services.card4.title: Managed Services
dataPlatforms.services.card4.li1: Flexible squads: architect, data engineer, analyst
dataPlatforms.delivery.title: Delivery
dataPlatforms.delivery.desc: We deliver in phases with measurable outcomes and production-ready releases.
dataPlatforms.delivery.step1.title: Discovery
dataPlatforms.delivery.step1.desc: Clarify data sources, requirements and constraints.
dataPlatforms.delivery.step2.title: Design
dataPlatforms.delivery.step2.desc: Define target architecture, modeling and security approach.
dataPlatforms.delivery.step3.title: Implement
dataPlatforms.delivery.step3.desc: Build the platform, pipelines and governance framework.
dataPlatforms.delivery.step4.title: Operate
dataPlatforms.delivery.step4.desc: Monitor, optimize and sustain the platform via managed services.
dataPlatforms.cta.title: Ready to Transform Your
dataPlatforms.cta.desc: From data platforms to AI solutions, we help organizations turn data into measurable business value.

partners.hero.desc: Intellica establishes strategic alliances with the world's most powerful technology companies. Together, we provide our clients with vendor-agnostic, best-in-class solutions that accelerate digital transformation across every industry.
partners.grid.label: Ecosystem
partners.grid.title: Our Strategic
partners.grid.sub: We collaborate with global technology leaders to deliver world-class solutions.
partners.cta.title: Ready to Transform Your
partners.cta.desc: From data platforms to AI solutions, we help organizations turn data into measurable business value.
meta.insights.title: Insights | Intellica
meta.insights.description: Actionable insights, technical guides, and methodology notes for data & AI transformation.
insights.hero.label: INSIGHTS
insights.hero.title: Data & AI Insights
insights.hero.desc: We turn complex data, AI, and business challenges into clear, actionable insights. Explore our perspectives, real-world experiences, and practical approaches to building data-driven organizations.
insights.featured.title: The Trust Standard in
insights.featured.desc: How to build production-grade AI systems with verified grounding, source-aware answers, and governed access. Discover our methodology for moving from Proof of Concept to reliable production.
insights.library.title: Insight
insights.library.sub: Search and filter through our collective knowledge.
insights.cta.title: Have an insight to

meta.privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Intellica
meta.privacy.description: Learn how Intellica collects, uses, and protects personal data shared through this website.
privacy.label: PRIVACY
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.sub: At Intellica, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal data you share with us through this website.
privacy.p1: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, company name, and any details you submit through our contact forms or other communication channels on this website.
privacy.p2: We use this information to respond to your inquiries, communicate with you, provide relevant information about our services, and improve our website and offerings.
privacy.p3: Intellica does not sell your personal data. We do not share your information with third parties except where necessary to operate our website, deliver services, or comply with legal obligations.
privacy.p4: We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, misuse, or disclosure.
privacy.p5: Depending on applicable laws, you may have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data. You may also contact us regarding any questions about how your information is handled.
privacy.p6: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact Intellica through our contact page.
meta.terms.title: Terms of Use | Intellica
meta.terms.description: Terms and conditions governing the use of the Intellica website.
terms.label: TERMS
terms.title: Terms of
terms.sub: These terms govern your access to and use of the Intellica website.
terms.p1: By accessing this website, you agree to use it only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, restrict, or inhibit the use of this website by any third party.
terms.p2: Unless otherwise stated, all content on this website, including text, graphics, branding, layouts, and visual assets, is the property of Intellica and may not be copied, reproduced, or distributed without prior written permission.
terms.p3: Intellica aims to keep the information on this website accurate and up to date. However, we do not guarantee that all content is complete, current, or error-free at all times.
terms.p4: Intellica is not liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from the use of this website or reliance on its content, to the extent permitted by applicable law.
terms.p5: This website may contain links to third-party websites. Intellica is not responsible for the content, security, or privacy practices of those external sites.
terms.p6: Intellica reserves the right to update these Terms of Use at any time. Continued use of the website after updates are published means you accept the revised terms.
meta.cookies.title: Cookie Policy | Intellica
meta.cookies.description: Information about how Intellica uses cookies on this website.
cookies.label: COOKIES
cookies.title: Cookie
cookies.sub: This page explains how cookies may be used on the Intellica website.
cookies.p1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites function properly, remember preferences, and understand how visitors interact with content.
cookies.p2: Intellica may use cookies to support essential website functionality, improve performance, and better understand how visitors use the website.
cookies.p3: Cookies may be used to collect aggregated information such as page visits, traffic sources, and general usage patterns. This helps us improve website usability and content effectiveness.
cookies.p4: You can control, disable, or delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling some cookies may affect the functionality of certain parts of the website.
cookies.p5: Intellica may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect website changes or regulatory requirements.
